title: Three Cards in Doflamingo's Hand
description: Pages 1–5 focus on three cards in doflamingo's hand, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as doflamingo, Law, Luffy, and the Sunny team are pulled into separate crises as Dressrosa's power structure tightens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! What was that explosion? And those gunshots!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's the Perde- tractor behind the misprint of my addiction this morning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He tried to yank me down from my throne, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's no need to worry now!! ...I've just eliminated this threat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: How dare you do that to Tora- Man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: to speak to me like that....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Law was origi- Nally one of my men!! I'm the one who had to set things right!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral, sir! The "pirate Hunter" is on the move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Hey!! Explain to us what's going on there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Law-Dono was felled before our very eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: The "pirate Hunter" ... and "kin'emon of the Foxfire" is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I saw a brat who looked an awful lot like momono- suke on that ship, back there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Don't let him trick you!! We'd never hand him over!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: It is for both our sakes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: But... this is seasons, isn't it...

summary: Three Cards in Doflamingo's Hand focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo, Law, Luffy, and the Sunny team are pulled into separate crises as Dressrosa's power structure tightens.
